sampleMessages: What is the capital of Japan?
session-chat.longRunningPrompt: Write a very detailed 2000-word essay about the history of computing

agent-settings.systemPrompt: You are a helpful coding assistant. Always respond concisely.

name: Detailed integrations: MCP, connected accounts, request interactions

mcp.verifyToolPrompt: Use the Jina AI primer tool to give me a primer on 'Anthropic Claude'.
mcp.triggerPrompt: Use the DeepWiki MCP to look up the documentation for the github repo 'anthropics/claude-code'.

connected-accounts.triggerPrompt: Use my GitHub account to list my repositories

request-interactions.secretTriggerPrompt: Please use my OPENAI_API_KEY to call the OpenAI API and list available models.
request-interactions.secretDeclineTriggerPrompt: Use my GITHUB_TOKEN to authenticate with the GitHub API
request-interactions.questionTriggerPrompt: Help me set up a project. Ask me what programming language I want to use.

name: Detailed artifacts: dashboards, scheduled tasks, browser use

browser-use.openPagePrompt: Open the website https://example.com in the browser and take a screenshot.
browser-use.interactPrompt: Take a snapshot of the page and click the 'More information...' link on example.com.
browser-use.searchPrompt: Open https://en.wikipedia.org and search for 'Claude (AI)'. Take a screenshot of the search results.

dashboard.createPrompt: Create a simple dashboard called 'clock' that shows the current time. Use the plain framework.

scheduled-tasks.createPrompt: Schedule a task that runs every 5 minutes and just says 'ping'. Confirm when scheduled.
